signals.headline: Oregon Republican gubernatorial candidates skip major debate | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Oregon Republican gubernatorial candidates skip major debate | YES | HIGH confidence**

Republican candidates Senator Christine Drazan and former Portland Trail Blazer Chris Dudley declined to participate in a planned Oregonian/KGW debate scheduled for April 30th.[2] Drazan stated she would participate in three other Republican-hosted debates instead.
matched_markets: Will Chris Dudley win the 2026 Oregon Governor Republican primary election?

signals.headline: Vice President Vance signals Iran nuclear negotiations ongoing | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Vice President Vance signals Iran nuclear negotiations ongoing | YES | MED confidence**

Vice President Vance stated "the ball is in the Iranian court" regarding nuclear negotiations and uranium enrichment limits, indicating ongoing diplomatic discussions.[4]

signals.headline: XRP Outperforms Market With 4% Gain on Rakuten Wallet Listing and SEC Crypto Roundtable | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP Outperforms Market With 4% Gain on Rakuten Wallet Listing and SEC Crypto Roundtable | YES | HIGH confidence**
